title: leaderboard.rebuilt
description: INTEGRATION-002 — Emitted by the Integration layer when the leaderboard read model is fully rebuilt. Consumers (cache layer) use this to invalidate cached leaderboard data.

rebuilt_at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp when the rebuild completed

entry_count.description: Number of ranked entries in the rebuilt leaderboard

triggered_by.description: UUID of the user who triggered the rebuild, or 'scheduler' for automated runs
